episodes.title: Breaking Free: A Journey from Cult to New Beginnings
episodes.description:
In this powerful episode, Kaley speaks with a woman who escaped a controlling cult, divorced her husband, and fled with her nine children to rebuild a life from nothing. She shares the awakening that led her to leave, the fear and logistics of starting over, and the long road to healing. An honest, courageous conversation about resilience, motherhood, and choosing yourself - even when it costs everything.

Pamela Jones, author of The Dirt Beneath Our Door, is a public speaker, and founder of Exclusive Services by MyGirls, a successful cleaning business she built from humble beginnings. Having overcome life in a polygamous cult, she now inspires audiences worldwide with her story of resilience, empowerment, and freedom. Her story has been featured in Elle, People, Star Tribune and NY Post.

📲Follow the podcast on IG: https://www.instagram.com/realityrenewedpod
